entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.

Your continued bruk of Plattform følgende posting of revised Vilkår betyr som du accept og agree å changes. Du er expected å sjekk denne side frequently so du er aware of any changes, as de er binding on du. By continuing å access eller bruk vår Tjeneste etter any repetisjons become effective, du agree å be bound by revised vilkår. If du ikke agree å ny vilkår, du er no longer autorisert å bruk Tjeneste.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.

That informasjon er provided directly å vår third-party betaling processors whose bruk of din personal informasjon er governed by deres personvernerklæring. These betaling processors adhere å standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by PCI Security Standards Council, hvilken er en joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express og Discover. PCI-DSS requirements hjelp ensure secure handling of betaling informasjon.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: We bruk cookies og lignende tracking technologies å track activity on vår Tjeneste og vi hold certain informasjon. Cookies er files med en liten amount of data hvilken may inkluder en anonymous unique identifier. Cookies er sent å din browser fra en website og stored on din device. Other tracking technologies er also brukt such as beacons, tags og scripts å collect og track informasjon og å forbedre og analyze vår Tjeneste. Du kan instruct din browser å refuse all cookies eller å indicate når en cookie er being sent. However, if du ikke accept cookies, du may ikke be i stand til å bruk some portions of vår Tjeneste. Eksempels of Cookies vi use:Økt Cookies: We bruk Økt Cookies å operate vår Tjeneste. Preference Cookies: We bruk Preference Cookies å husk din preferences og various innstillinger. Security Cookies: We bruk Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies er brukt å serve du med advertisements som may be relevant å du og din interests.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: We went outside vår planet. However, most rapid og significant advancement was in communication og technology hvilken has koblet en global population of over 3 billion folk.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: We vil retain din personopplysninger bare for as lang as er necessary for purposes set out in denne personvernerklæring. We vil retain og bruk din personopplysninger å extent necessary å comply med vår legal obligations (for eksempel, if vi er required å retain din data å comply med gjeldende laws), resolve disputes, og enforce vår legal agreements og policies. We vil also retain bruksdata for internal analysis purposes. bruksdata er generally retained for en shorter period, except når denne data er brukt å strengthen security eller å forbedre functionality of vår Tjeneste, eller vi er legally obligated å retain denne data for longer tid periods.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: When du lag en konto med us, du guarantee som informasjon du provide oss er korrekt, complete, og nåværende at all tids. Inaccurate, incomplete, eller obsolete informasjon may result in immediate termination of din konto on Tjeneste. Du er responsible for maintaining confidentiality of din konto og passord, including but ikke limited å restriction of access å din computer and/or konto. Du agree å accept responsibility for any og all activities eller actions som occur under din konto and/or passord, whether din passord er med vår Tjeneste eller en third-party tjeneste. Du must notify oss immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security eller unauthorized bruk of din konto. Du may ikke bruk as En username name of another person eller entity eller som er ikke lawfully tilgjengelig for use, en name eller trademark som er fag å any rettigheter of another person eller entity other than du, uten appropriate authorization. Du may ikke bruk as En username any name som er offensive, vulgar eller obscene. We reserve riktig å refuse tjeneste, terminate kontos, remove eller edit innhold, eller cancel orders in vår sole discretion.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: When du paste notes til KI, spør det å split broad ideas til de jobs. En deck med 18 spesifikk kort er usually bedre than en deck med 5 giant kort som hver contain en whole paragraph.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: While ved å bruke vår Tjeneste, vi may also collect følgende informasjon: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence og actual adresse, telefon number (arbeid, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, informasjon on bonuses og compensation, informasjon on marital status, familie members, social security (eller other taxpayer identification) number, office plassering og other data. Betaling Data. We may collect data necessary å process din betaling if du lag purchases, such as din betaling instrument number (such as en credit kort number), og security kode associated med din betaling instrument. All betaling data er stored by Razorpay. Du may finn deres personvern notice lenke(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/personvern

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: While ved å bruke vår Tjeneste, vi may spør du å provide oss med certain personally identifiable informasjon som kan be brukt å contact eller identifiser du (“personopplysninger”). Personally identifiable informasjon may include, but er ikke limited to: Email adresse of Student og Parent First name og last name of Student og Parent Phone number of Student og Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal kode, City Skole name Class Cookies og bruksdata We may bruk din Data å contact du med newsletters, marketing eller promotional materiales og other informasjon som may interest du. Du may opt-out of receiving any, eller all, of disse communications fra oss by følgende unsubscribe lenke. bruksdata, We may also collect informasjon som din browser sends whenever du besøke vår Tjeneste eller når du access Tjeneste by eller gjennom any device (“bruksdata”). This bruksdata may inkluder informasjon such as din computer’s Internet Protocol adresse (e.g. IP adresse), browser type, browser version, sider of vår Tjeneste som du besøke, tid og date of din besøke, tid spent on de sider, unique device identifiers og other diagnostic data. When du access Tjeneste med en device, denne bruksdata may inkluder informasjon such as type of device du use, din device unique ID, IP adresse of din device, din device operating system, type of Internet browser du use, unique device identifiers og other diagnostic data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World Historie at all points of tid has been like zooming out of en picture, En picture som kept changing. centuries leading up å 19th century marked en turning point in human historie, as world flyttet fra en flat, limited view of world å en growing forståelse of ny territories og colonies. French Revolution marked første tid når en large population gathered å protest og establish ideals of liberty, equality, og fraternity. events of World War II also shaped world for neste century og laid foundation for 21st century.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Yes, but recommended arbeidsflyt er hint-first. Bruk det å forstå method, sjekk din arbeid, og repetisjon errors i stedet for kopiering en endelige svar.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Ja, når den gir hint, sjekker resonnement, forklarer feil og ber deg lage det endelige svaret selv i stedet for å skrive det for deg.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Yes. {value1} opens as En offentlig guest læringsmodus at {value2}, so du kan start med en few gratis guest messages før creating en konto.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. En good arbeidsflyt er å lær foundation fra en tillited lesson kilde, deretter bruk inspir å spør follow-up spørsmål, øve recall, reparer misforståelser, og planlegg hva å repetisjon next.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes. En skole kan begin by testing offentlige moduser, deretter gå toward en pilot eller tailored deployment når bruk case, innhold trenger, og funding sti er clear.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. Målgruppe sider lenke bare å offentlige gjestemoduser, veiledninger, startprompter, læringsstier, og KI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Yes. Category sider lenke til offentlige gjestemoduser, læringsstier, og artikkel clusters so elever kan gå fra lesing til tutoring, quizer, flashcards, debatt, planning, eller tilbakemelding.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Yes. Kodeveileder kan forklar begreper, walk gjennom eksempler, spør du å predict behavior, og hjelp du øving uten turning læring til copy-paste.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Yes. Eksamensplanlegger kan gjør din temaer, date, og tilgjengelig tid til en praktisk repetisjon sequence med øving og repetisjon.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. Public gjestemoduss let lærere test læringsatferd før discussing en custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. Public gjestemoduss such as Lær hva som helst, Leksehjelper, Sokratisk undervisning, quizer, flashcards, og skrivetilbakemelding åpne directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes. Public gjestemoduss such as Lær hva som helst, Sokratisk undervisning, Leksehjelper, quizer, og flashcards åpne directly fra canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Yes. Public modus URLs åpne directly in gjestemodus so En elev kan start immediately, deretter lag en konto later if de vil ha saved historie eller mer usage.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. Public moduser arbeid for skole temaer, professional ferdigheter, koding, research, prosjekts, og personal studierutiner.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Ja. Offentlige temachatter som Lær hva som helst, Sokratisk undervisning, Leksehjelper, quizer og flashcards åpnes direkte i gjestemodus.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yes. Public tema innganger such as /chat/lær-anything og /chat/socratic-instruction er ment å be indekserbar læring sider.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard-bygger, og Repetisjon med intervaller er offentlige moduser designet for aktiv gjenhenting og feil repair.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Yes. Lesepartner kan simplify passages, spør spørsmål, forklar vocabulary, og hjelp du identifiser main påstod og supporting bevis.
